authorization_finding.required: explicit standing phrase or exact one-off owner marker

write_surface_findings: stable target switch apply may materialize stable-repair-target, approved-repair-target.json, and target-switch-transaction.json
stable repair apply may mutate only stable-repair-target/codex-*.json plus ephemeral transaction scratch
launch smoke may write runtime activation evidence and generated stable runtime config surfaces
safety_findings: live mutation without explicit authorization is unsafe
success must be interpreted from JSON packets, not exit code alone
rotation evidence remains unsafe for stage proof if it is insufficient or contradicted
orchestrator_interpretation: Inspection supports stopping before live mutation because active-thread authorization was absent.
